title: Blue Skies Bark
description: Blue Skies Bark drops bark from Blue Skies trees when they are debarked.
body:
This mod is an extension for the mod "Treebark".

 

Requires: [Tree Bark](https://modrinth.com/mod/tree-bark) and [Blue Skies by Modding Legacy](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies)

 

This mod adds bark from "Blue Skies" trees to the game that is obtained when debarking (drop number configurable in the Treebark config).
This bark can be used as fuel, for crafting paper or can be reattached to the corresponding tree trunk by right-clicking.
- minimum of bark in hand = drop from block e.g.: Oak Log dropped 4 = 4 for rebark, Oak Wood dropped 6 = 6 for rebark.
